update:
You can  ask Gemini Cloud Assist about active incidents, their impact, and updates 
 You can  view incidents related to your App Hub applications in Cloud Hub . See  instructions for displaying incidents in Cloud Hub .

Personalized Service Health supports Agent Assist, Backup for GKE, Batch prediction, Cloud Contact Center, Cloud Customer Care, Cloud Vision, Identity Platform, Memorystore for Redis Cluster, Online prediction, Retail API, Talent Solution, Text-to-Speech, Vertex AI Model Monitoring, Vertex AI Model Registry, and Vertex AI Pipelines. See the  updated list .
Incident reports  are available in Personalized Service Health.
Added  stable product IDs  for Google Cloud products to use in API calls and alerting policies.

Personalized Service Health supports Backup and DR Service, Batch, Cloud Billing, Colab Enterprise, Document AI, Google Cloud VMware Engine, Hub, Migrate to Virtual Machines, Vertex AI Search, and Web Risk. See the  updated list .

Personalized Service Health supports Application Integration, BigQuery Data Transfer Service, Cloud Tasks, Cloud Workstations, Google Cloud NetApp Volumes, Dataform, and Integration Connectors. See the  updated list .

Personalized Service Health supports Bare Metal Solution, Cloud Build, Cloud Service Mesh, Cloud Data Loss Prevention, Cloud Scheduler, Cloud Source Repositories, and Vertex AI Workbench. See the  updated list .
Personalized Service Health is  available in the Google Cloud mobile app .
Personalized Service Health is generally available ( GA ).
Personalized Service Health supports AlloyDB for PostgreSQL and Resource Manager API.
Cloud SQL and Cloud Bigtable support  Impacted  relevance .
Personalized Service Health is available in Preview.
